positive: A stylized, central composition of bioluminescent flora and celestial elements. Depict swirling constellations woven through giant, glowing tropical leaves and delicate mycelial root systems. The color palette should be deep indigo, vibrant cyan, emerald green, and accented with pops of luminous gold. Use a highly detailed, modern nature-core aesthetic with clean, crisp lines and strong contrast suitable for apparel printing. Focus on abstract patterns and smooth gradients, maximizing negative space around the central subject for silhouette appeal. Studio photography style, high detail, symmetrical composition, ultra-sharp focus.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, low quality, blurry, grainy, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, poorly drawn, cropped, out of frame, ugly, messy, muted colors
